decision.rationale: The bounded policy result shows historical queue lifecycle normalization should remain interpretive and partial. Clean completed and still-live routed entries can map to modern meaning, but progressed or deferred historical routed rows should remain stored evidence rather than being rewritten or treated as active routing.
decision.stay_experimental_reason: A full stored-queue migration is not justified without stronger product pressure, and broad queue rewrite would add risk without changing the real current-head continuation model.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - clarifying the queue truth boundary is still valuable as shared Engine policy even without a runtime surface
